name: ctxbrew
description: Pack library docs/source into versioned context bundles for AI agents. Language-agnostic.

scripts.build:darwin-arm64: BUN_NO_CODESIGN_MACHO_BINARY=1 bun build --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-arm64 ./src/bin/ctxb.ts --outfile dist/ctxb-darwin-arm64 && codesign --force --sign - dist/ctxb-darwin-arm64
scripts.build:darwin-x64: BUN_NO_CODESIGN_MACHO_BINARY=1 bun build --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-x64 ./src/bin/ctxb.ts --outfile dist/ctxb-darwin-x64 && codesign --force --sign - dist/ctxb-darwin-x64
